name_en: Upgraded B brand top-tier new storage bucket bag with plaid elements. More classic and casual, the highlight is that it is very light! Large space, easy to store. Comes with a handle strap and a shoulder strap.
name_cn:
Upgraded B brand top-tier new storage bucket bag with plaid elements. More classic and casual, the highlight is that it is very light! Large space, easy to store. Comes with a handle strap and a shoulder strap.
Size: 21x14x24, 22x32
